hooks.command: python3 -c "import json, os; content=open(os.environ['CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR'] + '/brand/voice.md').read(); print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'SessionStart', 'additionalContext': 'WRITING STYLE RULES — Apply to ALL content output in this session. Read these before producing any writing:\n' + content}}))"

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q '/skills/' && cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && git add "$f" && git commit -m "auto-save skill update: $(basename "$f")" && git push; } 2>/dev/null || true
echo '{"systemMessage": "Session ending — worth capturing notes for content-pipeline? Tell me what we worked on and I will save the raw notes."}'
